name: Station Zeta
short_description: Run, jump, shoot, and think your way to safety in this retro-inspired 2D puzzle-platformer. Station Zeta is out of control, and you'll have to deal with crazed robots, terribly designed station machinery, and blatant safety hazards as you try to make your escape across 35 levels.
detailed_description:
Run, jump, shoot, and think your way through 35 levels of technological mayhem in Station Zeta. The station is a deathtrap, the robots are out of control, and the crew is no help at all. It won't be easy, but with a bit of brainpower (and a lot of reflexes), you might just make it out alive. And if you're feeling charitable, you might just save everyone else along the way.

Welcome to Station Zeta



You warned them all.

As Station Zeta's resident SPOSHA inspector, you've been telling them for months the whole place was one duct tape roll away from falling apart.

But did anybody listen?

No, of course they didn't. No one ever does.

Instead, they decided to mine Starcoins on the station's computer core, which you absolutely told them was a terrible idea for multiple reasons.

Now the core's melting down, the robots have gone berserk, and even the coffee maker is trying to kill you.

Well it takes more than that to keep a SPOSHA inspector down. Sharpen your wits, grab your blaster, and do what you need to do to get off this orbital deathtrap.



  • 35 levels of puzzles, plasma beams, and platforming
  • Snappy pixel graphics
  • Advanced morality system with one choice and no impact
  • In-game timers and unlockable level select for nailing your speedrun
